overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing protagonist Aloy traversing a vast desert landscape during golden hour. The character walks across sandy dunes with dramatic mountain backdrops, approaching ancient ruins while cinematic warm lighting creates long shadows across the terrain.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the sandy ridge with a bow on her back, surveying the desert landscape ahead

entered.detail: large rocky mountain formation silhouetted against the golden sky
rolling sand dunes with visible footprints and wind patterns
dry desert bushes and sparse yellow wildflowers

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide desert vista during golden hour, with the character walking along a sandy ridge. A prominent mountain peak dominates the distant center while sparse scrub vegetation dots the foreground. The lighting creates warm orange tones across the sand as the character moves steadily forward.

events.description: game notification 'Discovered SHELTER' appears briefly on screen
terrain transitions from grassy sand mix to pure sand dunes as the character descends
ancient ruined structure becomes visible on the right horizon

agents.ego_description: walking down the sandy slope toward the valley floor, with the camera following from behind

entered.detail: large decaying metallic structure with multiple towers rising from the desert
leafless white-barked trees scattered across the dunes

segments.scene_description: The character descends from the ridge into a sandy valley, with the ground becoming increasingly desert-like. Ancient ruins emerge on the right horizon while dead trees dot the landscape. The mountain peak shifts to the left as the camera follows the character's downward path.

scene_state.functional_zone: rolling sand dunes with distant ruins

events.description: character adjusts path slightly to navigate around dune ridge

agents.ego_description: traversing the rolling sand dunes, moving steadily toward the ruins visible on the right

entered.detail: tall green cacti with multiple arms rising from the sand

segments.scene_description: Moving through rolling sand dunes, the character approaches the ancient ruins which grow larger on the right. Tall cacti begin to appear on the left while the dead trees fall behind. The terrain remains open with expansive views of the desert haze in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert with scattered cacti approaching ruins

events.description: desert birds take flight and circle overhead

agents.ego_description: walking up a gentle dune slope with birds flying overhead, approaching the ruined structure

notable_agents.action: desert bird taking flight from the sand and circling in the air

entered.detail: dark birds soaring and circling in the sky above the dunes

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character ascending a dune with the sun creating a backlit effect. The ancient ruins loom larger on the right while tall cacti pass by on the left. Desert birds take flight and circle overhead as the character approaches the crest of the dune, revealing more of the expansive desert vista.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a vast desert vista that transforms from a high ridge walk into an ascent toward looming ancient ruins. It begins with the character traversing a sandy ridge under warm orange golden hour light, with a prominent mountain peak dominating the distant center. As the character descends from the ridge into a sandy valley, the mountain shifts to the left and the first glimpses of ancient ruins and dead trees emerge on the horizon. The scene then expands across rolling dunes where the ruins grow larger on the right and tall cacti replace the dead trees, all set against a backdrop of distant desert haze. Finally, the camera follows the character up a backlit dune as desert birds circle overhead, culminating at the crest to reveal the full scale of the ruins and the expansive landscape beyond.
